objective: Plan generic result and delta admission, owner-correct lifecycle and cancellation, restart reconstruction, archive-only replay, and negative-output retention.
falsifiable_claim: Non-software, invalid, negative, inconclusive, and challenged outputs remain inspectable while cancellation and replay cannot bypass owning lifecycle or effect fences.
exit_criteria: A non-software result passes the generic seam and all negative or challenged outputs remain inspectable.
Cancellation drains, fences, and reconciles by owner; restart and archive-only replay reconstruct without re-execution.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M3_RESULT_LIFECYCLE_NEGATIVE_RETENTION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Inject cancellation races, stale lifecycle transitions, replay from archive, duplicate results, invalid deltas, inconclusive output loss, and challenged-output suppression.
remaining_nonclaims: No acceptance authority or collective pursuit.
Archived evidence cannot execute, authorize, or close a stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
